hero.subtitle: Self-Service Laundry & Shop
hero.description: Your trusted laundry in Fuengirola. Washing from €6, drying from €3. We also offer laundry services for vacation rentals and full property management.

services.title: Complete solutions for your
services.subtitle: From self-service laundry to full property management, we offer professional services tailored to your needs.

selfService.title: Self-Service Laundry
selfService.description: State-of-the-art machines available 24 hours. Pay conveniently with coins, bills or debit/credit cards.

vacation.title: Vacation Rental Laundry
vacation.description: Specialized service for owners and managers of tourist accommodations. Bed linen, towels and textiles always impeccable.

individuals.title: Individual Laundry Service
individuals.description: No time to do laundry? We do it for you. Complete laundry service for individuals with
individuals.descriptionEnd: . Tell us what you need and we'll take care of everything.

management.title: Vacation Property Management
management.description: We manage your property from start to finish. Check-in/out, cleaning, maintenance and guest care to maximize your profitability.

about.title: Passion for detail, commitment to your
about.p1: At OpenBlue Fuengirola we started 4 years ago with a clear mission: to offer a professional laundry service that makes a difference. We specialize in caring for white linen for vacation rentals and individuals, because we know that freshness and impeccable presentation are essential.
about.p2: We are driven by our passion for a job well done, for those small details that transform simple bed linen into a cozy experience for your guests. Every garment we treat, every stain we remove and every punctual delivery we make drives us to be better.
about.p3: We work with top-of-the-line, environmentally friendly products, because caring for your clothes and our planet go hand in hand. Whether you manage several vacation rentals or simply need a reliable laundry service for your home, we're here to make your life easier.
about.p4: We are constantly growing, expanding our capacity and improving our processes because we believe we can always offer you more. Your trust is our greatest motivation.
about.p5: Welcome to OpenBlue Fuengirola. Where every garment receives the care it deserves.

features.qualityDesc: We use premium products and professional techniques for impeccable results.
features.openDesc: Our facilities are available every day of the year, 24 hours a day.
features.teamDesc: Qualified staff committed to excellence in every detail.

contact.infoSubtitle: Visit us at our facilities or get in touch through any of the following means.

footer.description: Your trusted laundry in Fuengirola. Self-service laundry and vacation property management services.

gestion.heroTitle: Full Management of Your Vacation Rental
gestion.heroSubtitle: Relax completely. We take care of everything.
gestion.intro: At OpenBlue Fuengirola we turn your property into a constant source of income, without you having to worry about anything. We offer a 360° management service designed for owners looking to maximize their profitability without complications, stress or wasted time.
gestion.whatIncluded: What does our full management include?

visibility.title: Listing and visibility
visibility.description: We create and manage professional listings on the main vacation rental platforms (Airbnb, Booking, Vrbo and more). We optimize descriptions, photos and prices to attract more bookings and increase your occupancy.

guests.title: Guest support
guests.description: We handle all communications, inquiries and reservations. From first contact to farewell, your guests receive personalized and professional attention that translates into excellent reviews.

checkin.title: Check-in and check-out
checkin.description: We handle key handover and collection at agreed times, welcoming your guests and ensuring everything is perfect on arrival and departure.

cleaning.title: Professional cleaning
cleaning.description: After each stay, we carry out a thorough deep clean. Your property will always be immaculate, ready to receive the next guests with the highest standards of hygiene and presentation.

laundry.title: Laundry service
laundry.description: We collect, stain-treat, wash, dry and bag all bed linen and towels. We return them ready to use, with top-of-the-line, environmentally friendly products.

maintenance.title: Maintenance and supervision
maintenance.description: We carry out periodic inspections and coordinate any necessary repairs or maintenance. We detect problems before they become major inconveniences, protecting your investment.

financial.title: Transparent financial management
financial.description: You will receive detailed reports on income, expenses and occupancy. Total transparency so you always know how your property is performing.

gestion.trustTitle: Your property in the best hands
gestion.trustDesc: We know that your vacation rental is an important investment. That's why we work every day to generate the maximum possible income, maintaining its value and guaranteeing exceptional experiences for your guests. You just have to enjoy the benefits.
gestion.experienceDesc: With OpenBlue Fuengirola, renting your property is truly profitable and hassle-free. Over 4 years of experience managing vacation properties in Fuengirola back us up.
gestion.ctaText: Want to know how much you can earn with your property? Contact us for a personalized, no-obligation study.

autoservicioModal.title: Self-Service Laundry in Fuengirola
autoservicioModal.subtitle: A complete experience designed for your comfort
autoservicioModal.intro: At our self-service laundry, we don't just help you keep your clothes impeccable — we also offer a comfortable space to make the most of your time.
autoservicioModal.machinesDesc: We have industrial washers and dryers by GIRBAU, made in Spain, internationally recognized for their efficiency, durability and exceptional results.
autoservicioModal.washer19Desc: Ideal for blankets, duvets and large loads
autoservicioModal.washer15Desc: Perfect for medium loads and everyday laundry
autoservicioModal.dryer19Extra2: Extendable as many times as you need
autoservicioModal.vendingDesc: Coffee machine with a wide variety of hot options, soft drinks, snacks and sweets to make your wait more pleasant.
autoservicioModal.coffeeDesc: Delicious hazelnut coffee, latte, espresso, cappuccino, hot chocolate and many more options
autoservicioModal.wifiDesc: Browse, work or entertain yourself while you wait for your laundry
autoservicioModal.oxygenDesc: We use active oxygen in every wash, a powerful agent that removes tough stains, whitens and deeply disinfects without damaging fabrics. Perfect for caring for your clothes and protecting your family's health.
autoservicioModal.tip: Doing a seasonal wardrobe change? Come visit us. Store your clean and disinfected clothes with our large-capacity washers, ideal for blankets, duvets and all your winter clothing.
autoservicioModal.closing: We look forward to welcoming you in a clean, modern and easily accessible space, with all the services you need.

pisosModal.title: Professional Laundry Service for Your
pisosModal.introTitle: Forget the worries. We take care of every detail of your white linen.
pisosModal.introDesc: At OpenBlue Fuengirola we understand that bed linen and towels are at the heart of your guests' experience. That's why we've designed a comprehensive laundry service that completely frees you from this task, always guaranteeing the highest quality and impeccable presentation.

pickup.title: Home pick-up
pickup.description: We come to your property and collect all bed and bath linen after each check-out. You don't have to lift a finger.

treatment.title: Professional treatment
treatment.description: We apply specific stain-removal treatments when necessary, ensuring each piece recovers its original whiteness and freshness. We wash with top-quality, environmentally friendly products that protect fibers and extend the life of your textiles.

drying.title: Drying and preparation
drying.description: We dry and individually bag each set, ready to use for the next check-in. Everything perfectly organized and protected.

delivery.title: On-time delivery
delivery.description: We return clean, ready linen within agreed timeframes, so your property is always prepared to receive the next guests without delays.

pisosModal.trustTitle: Your peace of mind, our priority
pisosModal.trustDesc: We know that managing a vacation rental involves paying attention to a thousand details. With our laundry service, you eliminate one of the most repetitive and critical tasks. Your guests will always enjoy impeccable, fresh and cozy linen, and you'll gain time to focus on what really matters: maximizing your profitability and offering memorable experiences.
pisosModal.experienceDesc: Trust OpenBlue Fuengirola. Over 4 years of experience back us up as the perfect partner for owners seeking professionalism, punctuality and impeccable results.
pisosModal.ctaText: Want to know more? Contact us and we'll prepare a tailored plan for your property.
